title: CS Jobs 2026 – Technical Assistant
shortInfo: IIEST Shibpur Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 is now open for 1 vacancy of Technical Assistant, for candidates with B.E./B.Tech in CSE/IT, MCA, Diploma in CSE/IT, or M.Sc. CS/IT (First Class or equivalent), with applications accepted online from 11 May 2026 to 11 June 2026 through the official website iiests.ac.in

basic_details.job_title: IIEST Shibpur Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology, Shibpur
basic_details.short_information: IIEST Shibpur Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 is now open for 1 vacancy of Technical Assistant, for candidates with B.E./B.Tech in CSE/IT, MCA, Diploma in CSE/IT, or M.Sc. CS/IT (First Class or equivalent), with applications accepted online from 11 May 2026 to 11 June 2026 through the official website iiests.ac.in

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the IIEST Shibpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.details: Technical Assistant: Essential (any one): B.E./B.Tech in CSE/IT, MCA, Diploma in CSE/IT, M.Sc. CS/IT (First Class or equivalent). Desirable: 2 years experience in Software Configuration/Coding.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIEST Shibpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the IIEST Shibpur Technical Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Technical Assistant post at IIEST Shibpur is 11th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to possess a B.E./B.Tech in CSE/IT, MCA, Diploma in CSE/IT, or M.Sc. in CS/IT with a First Class or equivalent. Experience in Software Configuration/Coding is desirable.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technical Assistant position is 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, which can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Technical Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Technical Assistant post announced by IIEST Shibpur in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the application fee for the Technical Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹1,000/- for General/OBC candidates and ₹500/- for SC/ST candidates. This fee is payable online during the application process.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Technical Assistant role includes a Screening Test, followed by a Presentation, and finally an Interview.

faq.question: Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Technical Assistant position at IIEST Shibpur is a contractual job. Candidates should refer to the official notification for details on the contract duration.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the IIEST Shibpur official website.

faq.question: What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Technical Assistant recruitment at IIEST Shibpur is RO/MY/26/12.
